Terraforming_1.TutorialText_11_F5F98E9C47DA80DC659CA998: NSLOCTEXT("", "218321004117447E9C75BC8882A9B1FA", "If you're going to expand your Outpost, you'll need to start clearing some free space. When in Build Mode, you can also enter Terraform Mode using the Terraform button. Terraform Mode is only available on the Surface, and will allow you to clear natural items like rocks and trees from the world to make way for your Outpost. While in Terraform Mode: Using (LMB) on an object in the world will select and highlight it for removal. Using (LMB) again on the same object will remove it. You can deselect an object with (RMB). Any destructible objects connected to the object you'd like to clear must first be removed before terraforming can take place. A new, larger Habitat has been unlocked for construction. You may need to clear some space to build it. You can use the new Connector to attach it to your existing Habitat.")
